infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Solvix Math uses the camera to scan and solve math expressions instantly.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Solvix Math accesses your photo library so you can solve math from existing photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Solvix Math uses the camera to scan math expressions and solve them instantly.

plugins.photosPermission: Solvix Math accesses your photos to solve math expressions from images.
Allow Solvix Math to save solved math results to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Solvix Math to save results to your gallery.
